name: normalmap
_comment: Slice BE NormalMap-node showcase. PBROutput.normal = NormalMap(slot="normalmap") so the surface's shading normal is perturbed by the tangent-space normal map (decode(c)=c*2-1, then the codegen rotates it into world space via the SAME Gram-Schmidt TBN lit.frag.hlsl uses). baseColor / metallic / roughness are PLAIN constants so the ONLY visible difference vs a flat surface is the normal detail (bump/relief shading). Build-time codegen -> shaders/generated/mat_normalmap.frag.hlsl -> the same HLSL->SPIR-V->MSL toolchain.
